---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaves unexpectedly.
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

What broke? One to three sentences. Stick to facts — what you did, what happened, why it surprised you.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

A minimal sequence that reproduces the bug on a clean clone is worth ten paragraphs.

## Expected behavior

What you thought would happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. If you saw an error message, paste the one-line summary here and put the full traceback under **Logs** below.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Python version:** output of `python --version`
- **devboard version / commit:** output of `git rev-parse --short HEAD`
- **LLM provider:** Claude (CLI) / OpenAI / Ollama
- **Model:** e.g. `claude-opus-4-7`, `gpt-4o`, `llama3.1:8b`
- **Browser (if UI bug):** e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126

## Logs

<details>
<summary>Click to expand</summary>

```
Paste tracebacks, dashboard logs, or `devboard-start.sh` output here.
Trim secrets (API keys, tokens) before pasting.
```

</details>

## Additional context

Screenshots, related issues, recent changes, anything else that helps reproduce or diagnose.
